subcodes.first_line: This is the Book We have sent down in truth and made it the nectar of utterance for all who dwell within the realm of possibility, and the fountain of bounty for those in the world [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: کتاب انزلناه بالحق و جعلناه رحیق البیان لمن فی الامکان و کوثر الکرم لمن فی العالم
subcodes.subjects: @praise and encouragement, @the Word of God; influence and centrality of, @rejection of Muhammad, @exhortations and counsels, @heedlessness and ignorance of the people
